description_long: This is a rectangular, beige plastic toolbox with a textured exterior and a hinged lid that opens to reveal a multi-tiered, cantilevered tray system. The trays are divided into several small compartments, each holding various small items such as fishing lures, bobbers, and hooks, suggesting it may be used for fishing or small tool organization. The front of the box features a red and yellow stripe with the 'fenwick 1800' logo printed on the lower right. A red latch is visible on the front, securing the lid when closed, and a sturdy, rectangular handle is attached to the front for carrying. The trays are arranged in three levels, with the uppermost tray divided into six sections and the lower trays into more numerous, smaller compartments. The overall construction appears lightweight yet durable, suitable for portable use in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A beige, multi-tiered plastic toolbox with cantilevered trays, a red latch, and a 'fenwick 1800' logo on the front. It features multiple small compartments for organizing tools or fishing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open toolbox with three cantilevered trays, visible compartments filled with small items, a red latch, and the 'fenwick 1800' logo.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the staggered, open trays and the depth of the main compartment, with some tray contents visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the top tray and the main body, with fewer visible details and no logo or latch.
description_view_3: Right-side view displaying the open trays from the opposite angle, showing the compartment arrangement and the hinge mechanism.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, fixed plastic handle attached to the front, designed for carrying; ergonomic grip with a solid, sturdy build.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single front clasp latch made of red plastic, snap-type, securing the lid to the base.
attribute_brand_logo: A 'fenwick 1800' logo is visible on the lower right front exterior, printed in black and orange text with a stylized underline.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Three cantilevered trays with multiple fixed compartments: the top tray has six sections, the middle and lower trays have more numerous, smaller compartments; all trays are fixed and not removable.
attribute_external_labeling: 'fenwick 1800' logo on the front lower right exterior, with orange and yellow stripes.
